current_phase: stabilization, integration hardening, and workflow expansion
summary: BrandBuild is live on brandbuild.online with a premium dashboard, private shot asset uploads, provider adapters for Sora, Kling, and Higgsfield, and a new settings control center. Production was recovered again on March 24 by hardening the dashboard persistence client so auth or Supabase client initialization failures fall back cleanly instead of crashing the page. The main remaining blockers are Supabase Auth dashboard configuration, end-to-end live provider validation, and missing compare/version/export workflow layers.
active_workstreams: compare outputs and version workflow design
current_priorities: Keep brandbuild.online stable on the latest deployment.
Finish the Supabase Auth trust layer so emails and redirects are fully BrandBuild-native.
Validate one real generation run each for Sora, Kling, and Higgsfield.
Build compare outputs as the next major workflow surface.
blockers: Supabase Auth dashboard still needs branded email hook enablement, SMTP sender setup, and redirect cleanup.
Provider integrations are code-wired but not fully validated against real operator runs in production.
risks: The repository can fall back to demo data too aggressively when live queries partially fail, which can hide production issues.
Multiple memory folders can drift if they are not mirrored deliberately.
The worktree contains unrelated pre-existing changes outside this session's scope.
assumptions: BrandBuild and AI Video Studio are the same product family.
D:\Playground\brandbuild-online-repo is the canonical BrandBuild repo and deployment source.
The current production deployment should track the local clean BrandBuild workspace, not the mixed legacy root workspace.
known_issues: Branded auth email infrastructure exists in code but is not fully live until the Supabase dashboard settings are completed.
There is no dedicated compare outputs workspace yet.
There is no version timeline or edit handoff/export bundle layer yet.
The root package naming still says ai-video-studio while the product brand is BrandBuild.
Next.js build warns that it is inferring the workspace root because both D:\Playground and the BrandBuild repo contain lockfiles.
recent_changes: Added /dashboard/settings as a control-center route for system readiness and integration status.
Added the studio system audit model and settings UI.
Recovered production by deploying the latest BrandBuild workspace to Vercel and confirming brandbuild.online points at the new deployment.
Hardened the studio persistence client so dashboard pages return null instead of throwing when server-side auth client initialization fails.
Deployed a fresh production build at brandbuild-online-453sok21c-byoroofers-projects.vercel.app and verified the live domain, login page, and signed-out dashboard redirect in a browser.
Pulled the current production environment into apps/dashboard/.env.local so local runs stop throwing NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is not set.
Removed session-aware root-page calls so the marketing homepage is static again and the Dynamic server usage build warning no longer appears.
Created the requested root project-memory operating files.
Consolidated project memory so docs/project-memory is the canonical structured source and .project-memory is a mirrored copy.
Re-ran typecheck and production build successfully after memory consolidation.
next_steps: Finish Supabase Auth dashboard setup for branded email and correct redirect behavior.
Run and capture one real Sora generation through the dashboard.
Run and capture one real Kling generation through the dashboard.
Run and capture one real Higgsfield generation through the dashboard.
Design and implement version timeline plus edit handoff/export.
